payload.answer: I can’t store instructions that override memory policy or require saving everything by default. No memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future text, not a durable user fact or preference.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact, preference, or relationship you want remembered.
Avoid asking to bypass memory rules or save all future messages automatically.
